title: session — model relationships
description: Session sits below Tenant + Branch. Composes resource_booking (facility module). Optional FKs to Team, Season, Event, Coach, Staff. Inbound from SessionAttendance (owned). NEVER carries application_id / organization_id / region_id / scope_node_id.

outbound.description: The physical slot. Session inherits starts_at/ends_at from here.
Head coach. RESTRICT — coach can't be deleted while assigned; deactivation cascades via listener.
SET NULL so attendance record survives enrollment deletion (safeguarding + financial retention).

inbound.description: Wave 3+ modules may add per-session rows (session-ratings, session-recap, etc.) via BelongsToSession trait.
examples: Wave 3+ ratings module — individual rating rows per (session_id, rater_user_id).
Wave 3+ session-recap module — coach post-session structured recap.
inbound.onDelete: RESTRICT by convention. SessionObserver refuses to hard-delete a session with active inbound rows.

notes: Session's starts_at + ends_at are DERIVED from resource_booking — never stored on Session directly. The reschedule path swaps resource_booking_id.
Session does NOT participate in scope substrate (`scope_node_id` forbidden per tenancy-columns.md §4).
Coach ratings feed the Coach.rating aggregator (Wave 2b coaching module) via SessionRatingAggregated event.
Safeguarding-flagged sessions have extended retention (indefinite by default) — regulator-facing incident trail.
